title: Fee-variance reconciliation — delivery hand-off
subtitle: Discovery run · fee-variance-reconciliation · synthetic data, non-production

blocks.p: For a reconciliation analyst who must ensure invoiced TPP fees match the contracted tariffs, fee variances are invisible until the month-end close and inconsistent across the ledger, the Hub invoice, and the contract.
This causes financial leakage that compounds for weeks, manual end-user-spreadsheet rework, and no lineage to evidence fee accuracy.

rows: Time to detect a fee variance
within a day of the invoice line

blocks.p: Residual risk Very Low, Conditional on read-only observability + reconciliation over commercial fee metadata. Maps to DR-1.1-003, DR-1.3-001, DR-1.4-001 with CTRL-DQ-003 / 006 / 012.

list: Commercial data only — no PSU PII

blocks.p: A fee-variance reconciliation monitor: open variances per invoice line, one reconciled figure across systems, and accuracy lineage on demand.

blocks.note: The right diamond authors the solution from scratch against the delivery contract. This brief informs; it does not design.
